sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kumpi, Kumpi, Kumpi, Kumpi lianbel pia un

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: amah Kumpi pia un, Amah Kumpi pia un
Zise suan in phatna ngah hen
Kumpi, Kumpi, Kumpi, Kumpi lianbel pia un

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong tan zo hi hehpihna tawh
Kumpi, Kumpi, Kumpi, Kumpi lianbel pia un
